title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A REST PARK IN BARANGAY TULO, MUNICIPALITY OF CALAMBA, PROVINCE OF LAGUNA

chunks.text:
H. NO. 2333 / 88 OG No. 21, 3052 (May 25, 1992) ; Journal 4/9/92

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7351, April 02, 1992 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A REST PARK IN BARANGAY TULO, MUNICIPALITY OF CALAMBA, PROVINCE OF LAGUNA

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established, under the supervision of the Department of Tourism, a rest park in Barangay Tulo, Municipality of Calamba, Province of Laguna.

SEC. 2. The Department of Tourism, through the Philippine Tourism Authority and in coordination with other government agencies concerned, shall prepare the plans necessary for this purpose and effect the construction of the rest park within one (1) year from the approval of this Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days from its complete publication in the Official Gazette or in at least two (2) national newspapers of general circulation, whichever comes earlier.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on February 3, 1992 and January 23, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.)

ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.)

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: April 2, 1992

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
